title: MikroTik FTC11XG, 10Gbps Fiber to Ethernet convertor
description: FTC11XG is a 10Gbps fiber-to-metal converter with an implemented switch-chip, SwOS Lite management (VLAN support, LAG, IGMP, SNMP, ACL, traffic shaping...) in outdoor design with IP55 protection . This converter has one Gigabit LAN port with PoE-IN support, one 10 Gbps LAN port and one 10 Gbps SFP+ slot for inserting optical modules. The converter can be powered in various ways, the standards of active PoE (802.3af/at/bt), passive PoE (43 - 57V) and power supply using a DC connector with a… Device Power adapter 48V / 0.95A Gigabit PoE injector Wall mount Screws, dowels
